topic: FaceTime with Naomi — she wants to be a vet now

turns.content: just got off facetime with naomi and man that girl changes what she wants to be every single week it kills me in the best way possible
Ha, what's the career of the week this time? Last time you talked about her she was pretty passionate — is she still on the same thing or has she pivoted?

oh she has pivoted hard she now wants to be a veterinarian because apparently there is a stray cat that hangs out behind her school and her and her friends have been feeding it at lunch and she named it doctor pickles and now she thinks she needs to become a vet to save all the animals in newark new jersey

Doctor Pickles! That is an elite cat name. I love that she didn't just name the cat Pickles — she gave it a title. And the fact that she went from feeding a stray cat to deciding she needs to save all the animals in Newark is exactly the kind of logic a kid her age would have. That's a big heart.

thats my girl right there she has the biggest heart you know she was telling me all about how doctor pickles has a hurt paw and she wants to take it to the vet but danielle said they cant bring a stray cat home which is fair because they live in an apartment but naomi was like daddy can i bring doctor pickles to your apartment and i was like baby i am never there how am i going to take care of a cat

The immediate pivot to asking daddy is classic. She knows exactly which parent to work on! And she has a point in theory — your apartment is sitting there empty most of the time, could use some life in it. But a cat alone in a studio while you're on a 2-week run across the southeast isn't exactly ideal for the cat either.

Did she accept that answer or is she still working on you?

she is absolutely still working on me she said daddy the cat can stay by itself cats are independent and i was like girl who told you that and she said she watched a youtube video about cats and they dont need attention like dogs and i was thinking she is building a case like a little lawyer not a vet but i didnt say that because i dont want to discourage her you know

She's lawyering you with YouTube research at her age — that's impressive negotiation skills honestly. She came to the FaceTime call prepared with evidence. You might have a future attorney on your hands instead of a vet.

But you're right not to shut it down. The vet thing is sweet even if Doctor Pickles can't come live in your truck. Does she do this a lot — get really passionate about something and go all in?

oh man yes every few weeks its something new before this she wanted to be a teacher then before that she wanted to be a singer and before that it was an astronaut and i love every single one because she gets so excited and she does research and she tells me all about it on facetime and i just sit in the cab at some truck stop parking lot in alabama and listen to her talk for 45 minutes about how many years of school you need to be a vet and it is the best part of my whole week honestly nothing else comes close

That image of you parked at a truck stop in Alabama just soaking in 45 minutes of Naomi's vet school research is honestly beautiful. Those FaceTime calls are everything. She's exploring the whole world through these phases and you're giving her the space to dream big every time.

Did she ask you about your week or is it all Doctor Pickles right now?

she asked where i was driving and i told her tennessee and she said is that where dolly parton lives and i said yes and she said can you get me dolly partons autograph and i was like baby i dont think thats how it works but she was dead serious about it i was listening to a podcast about celebrity encounters on the road and now im actually wondering if dolly parton has ever been spotted at a truck stop because that would make naomis whole year

I hate to break it to you but I don't think Dolly is hanging out at the Pilot in Knoxville. But Dollywood is in Pigeon Forge, Tennessee — if you ever have a layover near there, you could grab some Dollywood merch for Naomi. Not an autograph but a kid would probably love a souvenir from Dolly's park.

Sounds like an amazing FaceTime session though. From Doctor Pickles to Dolly Parton in one call — Naomi keeps you on your toes.
